feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CBO UI App - Custom Catalog Extensions - Add to Business Catalog
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP Public Cloud we have several CBO with UI applications.According to document documentation Custom Catalog Extensions are generated, and after we need to assign it to a Business Catalog.(only standard one - in the popup to select business catalogs).

How can we add to Customer Business Catalog(YY*)? I need to create separare business roles to restrict access to CBO UI Apps and with standard ones it's not possible.

entry.title: The use of "Bank" role in BP and Bank Hierarchy in S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello

I found an article about BP role Bank and Bank hierarchy but could not imagine the actual use case of these. Is there any case that required this feature within scope item BFA and BFB area in S/4 HANA Cloud? 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/186460fdc35a4b64a713da9bb00deb1e/a1758116d9b24d48a99e3fa61af5de89.html?locale=en-US&version=2402.501

Kind Regards,

Eitaro

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: Read and access restrictions to specific G/L accounts
entry.content:
Hello!

We are wondering how we could give access and read restrictions to heterogeneous set of G/L accounts and hide rest of the COA like Authorization group function in ECC. Though the similar field seems to be available in S4HC, we cannot find possibility to restrict the role regarding it.

We have tried to make these restrictions by Functional area restriction, but it has zero effect to account visibility. Also we tried G/L account hierarchy restriction (HRYTYPE_HRYID_GL), which also did not help.

Is there any other possibilities how we could proceed with this issue?

BR,

Anssi Murtonen

entry.title: how to customize batch quantities on handling units in RF environment
entry.content:
Hello experts

unfortunately I have problems with mix HU in inbound processes. I would like to post goods receipt of batch managed material with different batch numbers all on one HU. 

How do I customize that there could be different batch numbers within one HU.

Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Do i need to set up org structure in both dev system public?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a problem regarding my dev 100 tenant in SAP public. We have confirmed all milestone and activates before this but it has now been standing on 60% for almost 3 days. When i read task 3-158 "manage transports" in my CALM system it says i need to set up both dev system (100 and 80) independentl. But when i go into my 80 tenant al activates has been confirmed without be doing any work in that cbc project. Does it transfer scope and org structure between system or is this why the milestone confirmation is on 60% because i haven't set up org structure in the 80 tenant?

entry.title: Enter data on customizing system
entry.content: Can we enter data on publuc cloud customizing system  to test layout before transfer requests?

entry.title: What is the complete list of function restrictions during software update?
entry.content:
During the system update uptime, certain actions are not executable. End users are trying to grasp the complete scope of function restrictions during the system update in order to plan work tasks in advance.

While several notes provide guidance, it appears that they do not cover all the restrictions. For example, manually creating a product master encounters the error "Function locked, software update running in parallel," which has not been mentioned in any existing notes.

Therefore, I would like to inquire if there are any notes or KBA lists that provide a comprehensive list of function restrictions during the system update uptime? Thank you.

p.s.: Below are the published notes regarding the function restrictions we can find so far:

  • 3381225 - Error : Function locked, software update running in parallel when running tasks in Data Monitor - SAP for Me
  • 3083137 - Error "Function locked, software update running in parallel" in VF01 when creating a billing document - SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me
  • 3042314 - Hotfix Collection deployment for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me
  • 2996675 - Migrate your Data App – Migration Cockpit: Migration objects fail to generate; inconsistency found or, system error during preparation appears due to SAP S/4HANA Cloud system upgrades - SAP for Me
  • 3097708 - Release upgrade for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2-System and 3-System Landscape - SAP for Me
  • 3024158 - Blue-Green Deployment for Hotfix Collection for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me

Best Regards

Fancy

entry.title: how to create network, activity and milestone in project system in s/4hana public cloud
entry.content: how to create network, activity and milestone in project system in s/4hana public cloud

entry.title: Email Template s/4 Hana cloud with FICA
entry.content:
I'm trying to assign my email Template to be used by the system when a customer renew/buy a new subscription. However, Sap is keep using the standard email Template.

This is what I've done:

  • Created the template via "Maintain email templates" app.
  • Assigned the template to the invoice via "Assign email templates" in customizing.
  • Assigned the email template via "Define Form Template for Correspondence" in customizing for FI-CA invoice.

Any Idea what I'm doing wrong here?

entry.title: Manage work center capacity for maintenance order
entry.content:
Dear,

When implementing SAP Asset Management S/4HANA Public Edition for a client, one of the requests is the following: being able to check the capacities available of a work center before assigning hours to an operation.

I know that there is the Work Center Utilization app via the license Resource Scheduling (43R) but we want to know if there is an equivalent to check the capacities without this license.

I have found a Production tile: Manage Work Center Capacity. I have defined, in My Area Of Responsibility, a work center group that I have created by including my maintenance work center in it.

The issue that I have is that I do not see the percentage of the utilization of my maintenance operations, yet I cannot see the work planned (see my pictures attached) > the utilization is empty for my work center RES-0100; Capacities are available in the header of my work center & my maintenance order operations are either ready to schedule or dispatched already.

Can you please help and let me know if there is a configuration missing or another alternative to check capacity planning without the Resource Scheduling app?

Thank you,

Dany R.

entry.title: This WBS element is already assigned to another sales document - error on Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Experts,

I am currently having some difficulties in assigning an Enterprise Project with Revenue to my sales order line items.

Once I select the project, I get the error "This WBS element is already assigned to another sales document" - this happens to other projects, not just one. However, in order to test this from scratch, I have recreated the project, making sure it's not sued on other sales orders.

Based on some KB articles and community posts, I understand that there are some setting I need to apply to the Project, some of those below:

1. Make sure the project profile is "Project with Revenue"

2. Multiple Sales Order Items Scenario "Yes"

3. Project Stock - is marked with "Yes" - even if this not an available selection

4. Billing Element - "Yes"

5. Budget Availability Control Profile - PS001

6. Budget Availability Control Active - "Yes"

7 Costing Sheet - 1110PI

After Releasing, I can select the project on the sales order lines. However, on save, I get the same error.

Can someone let me know what can be the issue here?

Regards,
Seb

entry.title: Fiori ALP Visual Filter display error in RAP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm experiencing an issue with displaying the Visual Filter on a Fiori app, which I generated using the List Page Template. On the app screen, the Visual Filter shows an error, and when I debug, it seems that the service encounters a problem with the orderby syntax. Please could you provide me with suggestions or documentation to resolve this issue? Thanks a lot.

Image display error

Image $batch request error
URL: GET Travel?$orderby=TotalPrice_sum%20desc&$apply=groupby((CurrencyCode,OverallStatus,OverallStatusText),aggregate(TotalPrice%20with%20sum%20as%20TotalPrice_sum))&$skip=0&$top=3

 

If I using orderby with other field its working fine
URL: GET Travel?$orderby=OverallStatus%20desc&$apply=groupby((CurrencyCode,OverallStatus,OverallStatusText),aggregate(TotalPrice%20with%20sum%20as%20TotalPrice_sum))&$skip=0&$top=3

entry.title: 3244147 - How to retrieve the classification data from a batch?
entry.content:
Hi experts

I have a question to this note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3244147/E

Multiple CDS views can be associated in order to retrieve the classification data from a batch.
I_BATCHDISTINCT can be used to retrieve the Object No.  With the Object No. I_CLFNOBJECTCHARCVALFORKEYDATE can be used to retrieve the Characteristic Internal ID, Char. Value.
Then I_CLFNCHARCDESCFORKEYDATE can be used to get the characteristic description and  I_CLFNCHARCVALUEFORKEYDATE , I_CLFNCHARCVALUEDESCFORKEYDATE can be used to get the value description. 

In S4H Public cloud I tried to create a custom CDS view with scenario "Data Extraction" - the mentioned views would be associated to  I_BATCHDISTINCT . But I am getting the error message:

Selected associated Data Source: I_ClfnObjectCharcValForKeyDate must belong to the same bussiness area as Primary Data Source

How can I get these views into one view? I need them to extract to BW4H later on.

Thanks for your help, tom

entry.title: Automatic assignment of serial number in outbound deliveries
entry.content:
In our logistics process we make purchases with items that handle series.

These products are sold and it is required that when executing the outbound delivery job the system generates the document with the series already entered from purchases

Any idea how to do this?

We have tried to put in the series profile that it is mandatory to mark it in the sales order, but the existing series in the system do not appear in the sales order, generating news that it does not exist, do you perhaps know why this happens?

entry.title: how can i close the open po or shortclose in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi team,

I have requirement to short close the open PO, that is needed in bulk option please suggest the method in SAP public cloud.

i have used delivery completed indicator but it is allowing to post but when i used block item level it is not allowing to post. kindly suggest the suitable method in mass.

thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to define Action Box in Public Cloud (e.g. print 8D Report)
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are trying to define some activities in the action box in the public cloud. I've seen that it is possible now to use some badis (FOA_EXECUTION_FOR_TASK) to create own follow up actions and enable the use of them in the action box as activities. In on premise it was possible to use function modules (e.g. QM06_FM_TASK_CREATE_8DREPORT) and link them as activities in the action box. How can we reproduce this in public cloud?

entry.title: Enable Services for Object (GOS) in Quality Notification - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

the Button for Generic Object Services / Services for Object is missing in the quality notification. Is there a way to enable it?

entry.title: How to disable multiple logging from one User id in sap public cloud?
TM - Output request - Sender Country Can't be Initial
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I attempt to view the waybill or any other output in the TM app "Manage freight order" under the tab “Output request” tab and try to preview the output, I encounter the error message: “Sender country/region can’t be initial.” I’ve already filled in the “Sender Country” field in the “Define Rules for determination of Master form templates,” but the issue persists. Additionally, I’ve updated the business partner, but the error remains. Do you have any other solutions for resolving this error? 

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Transportation Management

entry.title: Can I apply WBS elements at item level on service orders using migration cockpit?
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

I am currently working on sap Public cloud. I would want to know if it is possible to add WBS elements at item level on service orders using migration cockpit. 

As I can understand, this object is not available on the standard cockpit and I think we can upload a template with the "Mapping of Work Breakdown Structure Element (WBS Element)" but when I apply it and check for updates on the template, there is no change or new zone dedicated for WBS elements. there is any document explaining that process? 

Thanks in advance
